name: BulkColumnExpression
description: Bulk Column Expression Node - Create or update multiple columns at once using a single Spark SQL expression. Ideal for applying consistent transformations, calculations, or formatting logic across many columns efficiently.
input: Accepts a single DataFrame as input from the previous node.
output: Outputs a DataFrame with multiple columns created or updated based on the provided expression.

fields.name: columnType
fields.title: Select Column Type
fields.description: filter the columns name in Select Columns based on type filter

fields.name: selectAllColumns
fields.title: Enable Select All Column of selected Column Type
fields.description: When true all the columns from the input dataframe should be selected of specified column type

fields.name: selectedColumns
fields.title: Select Columns
fields.description: Select one or more columns to which the expression should be applied. Each selected column will be processed using the same transformation logic.

fields.name: copyOriginalColumns
fields.title: Copy Original Columns
fields.description: When enabled, preserves the original columns and creates new columns with transformed values using a prefix or suffix. When disabled, the original columns are updated in place.

fields.name: outputColumnPrefix
fields.title: Prefix
fields.description: Optional prefix to add to the names of newly created columns. Helps clearly distinguish transformed columns from the originals.

fields.name: outputColumnSuffix
fields.title: Suffix
fields.description: Optional suffix to append to the names of newly created columns. Useful for versioning or indicating derived values.

fields.name: changeOutputDataType
fields.title: Change Output DataType
fields.description: Enable this option to explicitly cast the output columns to a specific data type after applying the expression.

fields.name: outputDataType
fields.title: Select Output Data Type
fields.description: Choose the target data type for the transformed columns (e.g., string, integer, double). Applied only when Change Output DataType is enabled.

fields.name: expression
fields.title: Expression
fields.description: Spark SQL expression applied to each selected column. Use the placeholder column_value within the expression to reference the current column being transformed (e.g., column_value * 100 or upper(column_value)).
